meta.name: Catppuccin Plasma
meta.author: Manifest OS
meta.description: A cohesive Catppuccin Mocha KDE Plasma desktop: a self-contained dark color scheme with a mauve accent, matched Konsole (blurred, Catppuccin), Breeze-Dark widgets with blur + contrast effects, Papirus icons and a JetBrains Mono terminal — all declared, no post-install shell.

settings.label: Display scale
settings.description: UI scale for HiDPI screens. 100% auto-detects.

settings.label: Wallpaper
settings.description: A local image path or a URL.

[org.kde.kdecoration2]
library=org.kde.breeze
theme=Breeze
BorderSize=Normal
BorderSizeAuto=false
ButtonsOnLeft=MS
ButtonsOnRight=HIAX

[Plugins]
blurEnabled=true
contrastEnabled=true
wobblywindowsEnabled=false

[Effect-blur]
BlurStrength=10
NoiseStrength=4

[Windows]
Placement=Centered

[Compositing]
Backend=OpenGL
GLCore=true

[Appearance]
ColorScheme=CatppuccinMocha
Font=JetBrainsMono Nerd Font,12,-1,5,50,0,0,0,0,0

[General]
Name=Catppuccin
Parent=FALLBACK/
TerminalColumns=110
TerminalRows=30

[Scrolling]
HistoryMode=2

[Terminal Features]
BlinkingCursorEnabled=true

[Background]
Color=30,30,46

[BackgroundIntense]
Color=30,30,46

[BackgroundFaint]
Color=30,30,46

[Color0]
Color=69,71,90

[Color0Intense]
Color=88,91,112

[Color1]
Color=243,139,168

[Color1Intense]
Color=243,139,168

[Color2]
Color=166,227,161

[Color2Intense]
Color=166,227,161

[Color3]
Color=249,226,175

[Color3Intense]
Color=249,226,175

[Color4]

[Color4Intense]
Color=137,180,250

[Color5]
Color=245,194,231

[Color5Intense]
Color=245,194,231

[Color6]
Color=148,226,213

[Color6Intense]
Color=148,226,213

[Color7]
Color=186,194,222

[Color7Intense]

[Foreground]
Color=205,214,244

[ForegroundIntense]
Color=205,214,244

[ForegroundFaint]
Color=205,214,244

[General]
Blur=true
ColorRandomization=false
Description=Catppuccin Mocha
Opacity={{opacity}}
Wallpaper=

# Catppuccin Plasma — Manifest OS
export EDITOR=nano
export HISTFILE=~/.zsh_history
export HISTSIZE=10000
export SAVEHIST=10000
setopt HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS SHARE_HISTORY

alias ls='eza --icons --group-directories-first'
alias ll='eza -lah --icons --group-directories-first'
alias cat='bat --paging=never'
alias grep='grep --color=auto'
alias update='sudo pacman -Syu'

# fzf keybindings if present
[ -f /usr/share/fzf/key-bindings.zsh ] && source /usr/share/fzf/key-bindings.zsh
[ -f /usr/share/fzf/completion.zsh ] && source /usr/share/fzf/completion.zsh

autoload -Uz compinit && compinit
eval "$(starship init zsh)"
command -v fastfetch >/dev/null && fastfetch

# Catppuccin Mocha — Manifest OS
add_newline = true
format = """
[](surface0)$os$username[](bg:surface1 fg:surface0)$directory[](fg:surface1 bg:none) $git_branch$git_status
$character"""

palette = 'catppuccin_mocha'

[palettes.catppuccin_mocha]
surface0 = '#313244'
surface1 = '#45475a'
mauve = '{{accent}}'
blue = '#89b4fa'
green = '#a6e3a1'
text = '#cdd6f4'

[os]
disabled = false
style = 'bg:surface0 fg:mauve'
[os.symbols]
Arch = ' '

[username]
show_always = true
style_user = 'bg:surface0 fg:text'
style_root = 'bg:surface0 fg:red'
format = '[ $user ]($style)'

[directory]
style = 'bg:surface1 fg:text'
format = '[ $path ]($style)'
truncation_length = 3

[git_branch]
symbol = ' '
style = 'fg:mauve'
format = '[$symbol$branch]($style) '

[git_status]
style = 'fg:blue'

[character]
success_symbol = '[❯](bold green)'
error_symbol = '[❯](bold red)'

{
  "$schema": "https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch/raw/dev/doc/json_schema.json",
  "logo": { "type": "file", "source": "/usr/share/manifest-os/logo.txt", "padding": { "top": 1, "right": 3 } },
  "display": { "separator": "  " },
  "modules": [
    { "type": "title", "color": { "user": "magenta", "host": "blue" } },
    "separator",
    { "type": "os", "key": " OS", "keyColor": "magenta" },
    { "type": "kernel", "key": " Kernel", "keyColor": "blue" },
    { "type": "de", "key": " DE", "keyColor": "cyan" },
    { "type": "wm", "key": " WM", "keyColor": "cyan" },
    { "type": "terminal", "key": " Term", "keyColor": "green" },
    { "type": "cpu", "key": " CPU", "keyColor": "yellow" },
    { "type": "memory", "key": " RAM", "keyColor": "red" },
    "break",
    { "type": "colors", "paddingLeft": 2, "symbol": "circle" }
  ]
}
